method_summary: The framework uses LLM agents to automate the research process through three stages (literature review, experimentation, and report writing) with human feedback at each stage.
key_innovation: The use of LLM agents as autonomous research assistants that can progress through the entire research process from idea to final paper.

key_results.research_expense_reduction: 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods
key_results.code_performance: state-of-the-art performance compared to existing methods

title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
